steps.title: Identify the suspense mechanism
steps.content: The claim states that Winnemucca creates suspense by emphasizing her physical response to an event. Find the quote where her bodily reaction to something happening builds tension.

steps.title: Match the quote to the claim
steps.content: Choice A shows her racing heartbeat and bodily fear as a horse approaches — her intense physical response creates the suspense. The others either celebrate happiness without suspense or narrate events without capturing her reactions. That matches choice A — A is correct.
